{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603220555364436CF25F03FF5EF9EA2"}"},"total":159},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7580210584832607000","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"我觉得写的还行，最起码其中对洛克斯的刻画十分到位，别的海贼同人文对洛克斯的定位都是那一种强大的路人甲，无需什么细节人物刻画，但这本书。把洛克斯塑造成一个实力强大，爱护亲人，重情重义的枭雄，明知自己面对的是800年前自己先祖也无法战胜的怪物，也会勇往直前挥刀。而且最新一话中，洛克斯的结局是大笑着离开这个世界，充满豪杰感，我觉得这才是一代枭雄洛克斯的结局，也算是弥补了海贼原作漫画的一个遗憾吧。","text_exts":[{"e":50,"s":47,"text":"路人甲","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E8%B7%AF%E4%BA%BA%E7%94%B2&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%231774130136F5EF9EA2%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227580210584832607000%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227559986469708762137%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E8%B7%AF%E4%BA%BA%E7%94%B2%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"}]},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1764908522,"group_id":"7559986469708762137","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N/gXMm4bPNhzJ1rJDNfVLrp9jN4INEcjMcTP/bo5zCjw","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-0000/7b92beed15144f519898bfe689051d51~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776704205&x-signature=yZBRyurrKDTyW8Ks9x781%2BPALhc%3D","user_id":"1921580302891579","user_name":"喜欢大姜的孙晟"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"1921580302891579","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":true,"sticker":{"expire_time":1774513366,"is_worn":true,"sticker":{"add_context":"","bg_color":"#E1DDFF","can_worn":false,"id":5,"name":"前排催更","small_url":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/dda89d247c75fa9dfdf08a80bd508401","sticker_type":1,"url":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/b9a497dac48a9ee6b81051a70c630d0f"}},"user_title_info":[{"en_title":"svip","icon":"{"icon_default_url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/07d37b2c30d271228698f77f4f7f7daf","icon_dark_url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/d67f15fefbb4470bb54c773eb84e90d8","icon_width":26,"icon_height":16}","intro":"{"title_name":"svip","title_id":"svip","icon_type":1}","is_author_title":false,"is_vip_title":true,"zh_title":"svip"}]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7559986469708762137","book_info":{"abstract":"【幻兽种迦楼罗】【假卧底当成真海贼】【无上大快刀-天龙戟】
重生海贼世界，投胎成了海军大将亲儿子的卡洛，本以为自己这波是天胡开局。
谁知他那倒霉老爹，竟然就是那个被洛克斯当成减速带，一脚踢死的‘文职大将’！
长大后，他以卧底的身份，前往哈奇诺斯，加入洛克斯海贼团。
本想尽忠职守，但谁知世界政府翻脸不认人。
既然如此，索性从此当个真海贼！
一个活着的传说，从哈奇诺斯开始！
他是：
洛克斯海贼团最年轻的四番队队长！
纵横大海的黄金迦楼罗！
凯多一生的阴影！
玲玲永远得不到的男人！
白胡子的挚友！
金狮子的死敌！
统治天空的王者！
天空海贼团船长！
人形古代兵器！
天王！索罗斯卡洛！
